input.body_text:
LearnTech Training

Your registration is confirmed!

Course: Python Programming Fundamentals
Dates: March 23-24, 2026
Location: LearnTech Training Center, 100 Tech Blvd, Austin, TX 78701

Please see the attached schedule (CSV) for detailed session times and instructors.

What to bring:
- Laptop with Python 3.10+ installed
- Notebook for notes

See you there!
LearnTech Team
